title: Legacy Crunch
description: Bring back the good ol' leg-breaking SFX back from Minecraft 1.3.2 with the addition of the new Hurt SFX!
body:
Legacy Crunch

- Readds the 5 damage SFX (2 generic hurt SFX, and 3 fall damage SFX) with the new damage SFX; The best of both worlds! Now you can *really* hear how bad your legs snap after falling off that infamous cliff again! Check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest](https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest) Video demonstrating the leg-breaking SFX https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CuBedHSH3Y&t=31s
